content:
# Recommendations — after iter-045

## TOP PRIORITY — one shared helper converts flat-7 into 7→5
Both the new B1 crux (`H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`, L286) AND B2
(`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat`, L221) reduce (verified) to the SAME
`leftAdjointUniq`/mate-calculus unit coherence. **Build the shared
`leftAdjointUniqUnitEta`-style helper FIRST** (root `leftAdjointUniqUnitEta` L1531 +
`conjugateEquiv_comp` / `mateEquiv_hcomp` / `iterated_mateEquiv_conjugateEquiv` +
`leftAdjointUniq_trans`; recipe `analogies/b2mate045.md`). The cheap prerequisite is the
~10–20 LOC restrict-side mirror of `conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv` (planner flagged this
in iter-045 plan §2). Land the mirror, then the helper, then both crux + B2 fall together.
- **Do NOT** raw-prove B2 via the sectionwise unit/tmul chase — established WRONG-SHAPE
  (carrier diamonds), confirmed by analogist `b2mate045` and project history.

## Closest-to-completion
- **B1 crux** (`H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict`): the genuine B1 keystone residual, fully
  isolated and reduced. Highest leverage — closing it makes B1 axiom-clean-complete and
  unblocks the per-leg helpers S2 needs.
- **B2** (`restrictFunctorIsoPullback_comp_compat`): same family; closes S4c-consumer chain.

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign as-is
- **S2/S3/S4a/S4b** (immersion-naturality of the 4-leg chart-chase): downstream of B1's
  per-leg helpers. Not free from `restrictFunctorComp.hom.naturality` (gives MORPHISM-naturality,
  not immersion). Attempt only AFTER the B1 crux + B2 land (they supply the per-leg identities).
- **telescope** (`trivialisation_restrict_compat`, L639): downstream of all squares; final assembly.

## Lean-side cleanup for the next prover (review cannot edit .lean)
- **B1 docstring L363–373** still says "NEW PRIVACY BLOCKER (iter-044)… BOTH private… UNBLOCK =
  de-private" — FALSE as of iter-045 (body uses `sheafifyTensorUnitIso_hom_eq'` at L415, both gates
  public). Prune/rewrite to reflect: gates cleared, body sorry-free, residual = helper crux.
- **`trivialisation_restrict_compat` comment L620** still lists S4c as outstanding; S4c is closed
  (iter-041) — strip.

## Coverage debt (1:1 tex) — 3 new uncovered Lean decls this iter (107 total `lean_aux`)
`archon dag-query unmatched` lists these prover-created helpers with NO blueprint entry — planner
should author `\label`+`\lean`+`\uses` next iter (the doctrine: when there is Lean there must be tex):
- `tensorHom_comp3` (TensorObjInverse.lean ~L58) — generic monoidal 3-fold tensor/composition
  interchange. Uses `MonoidalCategory.tensorHom_comp_tensorHom`. Sorry-free.
- `map_tensorHom_comp3` (~L72) — `F.map` of `tensorHom_comp3`. Uses `tensorHom_comp3`,
  `Functor.map_comp`. Sorry-free.
- `H1inv_app_eq_pullbackVal_restrict` (~L286) — per-leg sheafification of `H1.inv` =
  `η ; forget pullbackValIso ; forget restrictFunctorIsoPullback⁻¹`. Uses
  `Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_inv_app`, `homEquiv_unit`, `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`,
  `pullbackValIso`, `restrictFunctorIsoPullback`, `sheafificationCompPullback_eq_leftAdjointUniq`.
  **Has the B1 crux sorry.** This is now the sole residual of the B1 keystone — give it a
  prominent blueprint label.
- The remaining ~104 `lean_aux` nodes (generic plumbing + the `sheafifyTensorUnitIso` family just
  exposed) remain DEFERRED to the post-terminal Coverage+file-split phase per STRATEGY.md (mid-
  critical-path blueprint churn would starve the SOLO terminal lane — PARALLEL-LANE BUILD RACE).

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (iter-045)
- **Functor-image tensor distribution via `exact map_tensorHom_comp3 (C := …⋙ forget₂) …`** crosses
  carrier diamonds where `rw`/`erw`/`simp` of `Functor.map_comp` / `tensorHom_comp_tensorHom` all fail
  ("did not find pattern" / `MonoidalCategory` synth failure / WHNF-bomb). Pin the monoidal category
  `(C := …)` explicitly and apply by `exact` so the kernel absorbs the (𝟙 _.obj vs 𝟙 _.val) and
  intermediate-object diamonds definitionally.
- **`leftAdjointUniq` adjoint-uniqueness equations close via `homEquiv`-injectivity + term-mode
  `unit_leftAdjointUniq_hom_app`** (NOT `rw` — defeq-not-syntactic carrier; same as root `htri'`).
